prompt: I have a Spring Boot REST controller for managing products. I need to add an endpoint to update product prices. The price must be positive and the product must exist. Write tests for this endpoint using @WebMvcTest.

assertions.name: uses_mockbean_for_service
assertions.description: Uses @MockBean or @MockitoBean for mocking service layer

assertions.name: tests_success_scenario
assertions.description: Tests successful price update scenario with 200 OK

assertions.name: tests_failure_scenarios
assertions.description: Tests failure scenarios (product not found, invalid price)

assertions.name: verifies_http_status_and_body
assertions.description: Verifies HTTP status codes and response body using jsonPath
